next_steps: Send serum and urine for Leptospira PCR and serology (MAT)
Perform peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic organisms (Babesia)
Order comprehensive viral serology and PCR panel (Hantavirus, Hepatitis A-E, EBV, CMV)
Measure serum ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor, and triglycerides to evaluate for secondary HLH
Monitor serial electrolytes, renal function, and coagulation profile
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy (doxycycline/ceftriaxone) pending diagnostic results
Provide supportive care including respiratory management and hemodialysis if indicated for acute kidney injury

differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia with secondary multiorgan failure
next_steps: Send serum and urine for Leptospira PCR and microscopic agglutination test (MAT)
Obtain peripheral blood smear and PCR for Babesia microti
Measure LDH, haptoglobin, and reticulocyte count to confirm hemolytic anemia
Send serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 (IL-2 receptor) to evaluate for HLH
Perform urinalysis to assess for protein, cells, and casts
Initiate intravenous ceftriaxone for severe leptospirosis coverage
Coordinate with infectious disease and nephrology for potential continuous renal replacement therapy
